device_name: uMI Panvivo (uMI Panvivo); uMI Panvivo (uMI Panvivo S)
company: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.
intended_use: The uMI Panvivo is a PET/CT system designed for providing anatomical and functional images. The PET provides the distribution of specific radiopharmaceuticals. CT provides diagnostic tomographic anato
intended_use_full: The uMI Panvivo is a PET/CT system designed for providing anatomical and functional images. The PET provides the distribution of specific radiopharmaceuticals. CT provides diagnostic tomographic anatomical information as well as photon attenuation information for PET attenuation correction. PET and CT scans can be performed separately. The system is intended for assessing metabolic (molecular) and physiologic functions in various parts of the body, including the whole body, brain, head and neck, heart, lung, breast, gastrointestinal, urinary system and genital organ, musculoskeletal systems, and others organ or systems.
target_condition: Multiple oncologic, cardiac, neurologic, infection and inflammation conditions across whole body, brain, head/neck, heart, lung, breast, gastrointestinal, urinary and musculoskeletal systems; also low-dose lung cancer screening
ground_truth: For DeepRecon.PET and uExcel DPR: fully-sampled raw data reconstructed as ground truth; NEMA NU 2-2018 standard for NEMA IQ phantom scans. For OncoFocus: images without motion correction as reference. For DeepMAC: control images without metal artifacts as reference.
other_metrics: DeepRecon.PET: image bias <5%, superior background variability (BV) and signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) vs OSEM with Gaussian filtering, superior contrast-to-noise ratio (CNR). uExcel DPR: 81% average noise reduction, 391% average SNR enhancement on NEMA phantom; 1/10 of counts achieves matching noise level vs OSEM. OncoFocus: average lesion volume reduction vs no motion correction, improved lesion SUVmax vs no motion correction. DeepMAC: CT value difference in metal-affected areas reduced to ≤10 HU after correction.
